# Provenance

The support files in this directory (`mb_cmn/`, `mb_misc/`, `mb_sefaria/`,
`osis/`, and `ws/`) are vendored copies generated by
`MAM-basics/py/py_misc/mam_simple_copy_py_files.py` in the MAM-basics sibling repo.
They are overwritten on each run of `main_mam_simple.py`.

**Not vendored — do not overwrite:**

- `main_mam4sef_example.py` — maintained directly in this repo (MAM-simple);
  it is *not* copied from MAM-basics.
- `main_mam_osis_example.py` — maintained directly in this repo (MAM-simple);
  it is *not* copied from MAM-basics.
- `main_letter_small_job_example.py` — maintained directly in this repo (MAM-simple);
  it is *not* copied from MAM-basics.
